metadata.title: Contact elReda Advertising
metadata.description: Contact elReda Advertising for brand identity, websites, marketing, systems, printing, and AI automation projects in Egypt and the GCC.

hero.title: Start the conversation with the team that can connect the full project
hero.description: Tell us what you are trying to launch, fix, or scale. We will help you turn the first message into a clear next step.

response.label: Expected response
response.description: For qualified project requests, we reply with the best next action: quote, discovery call, or WhatsApp follow-up.

info.title: Reach the right channel for your project
info.description: Use the form for structured project details, or contact us directly when you need a faster first conversation.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Best for quick questions, follow-ups, and sharing initial references.

email.title: Email
email.description: Best for briefs, attachments, company profiles, and formal requests.

location.title: Location
location.description: Serving clients across Egypt, the GCC, and remote-first markets.

form.title: Send a focused brief
form.description: This form is a layout foundation only. Backend submission, email, CRM, and bot protection will be connected in the scheduled form sprint.

cta.title: Need a detailed quote instead?
cta.subtitle: Use the quote request flow when you already know the service, budget range, and timeline.
